title: Binary and Denary
description: Converting binary to denary and denary to binary using 8-bit place values.

steps.title: Do Now Activity
steps.content:
Do Now Activity

Quick check from binary place values.
steps.js: BinaryLesson.createPractice({containerId:'y9bd-dna',questions:[{prompt:'What is this worth?',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1]),answer:'129',right:'128 + 1 = 129.'},{prompt:'What is this worth?',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,1,0,0,0,0,0]),answer:'96',right:'64 + 32 = 96.'},{prompt:'Build 16, 8 and 4 as binary.',answer:'00011100',right:'Correct.'}]});

steps.title: Step Through: Binary to Denary
steps.content: Step through binary to denary
steps.js:
BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9bd-stepper-1',steps:[{title:'Start with 01101100',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,1,0,1,1,0,0]),note:'Line up each bit under its place value.'},{title:'Find the 1 columns',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,1,0,1,1,0,0]),note:'64, 32, 8 and 4 are active.'},{title:'Add them',html:'

64 + 32 + 8 + 4 = 108

',note:'So 01101100 is 108.'}]});

steps.title: Step Through: Denary to Binary
steps.content: Step through denary to binary
steps.js: BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9bd-stepper-2',steps:[{title:'Start with 150',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0]),note:'Check each place value from left to right.'},{title:'Choose values that fit',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,0,1,0,1,1,0]),note:'128 fits, 16 fits, 4 fits and 2 fits.'},{title:'Read the binary number',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,0,1,0,1,1,0]),note:'150 in 8-bit binary is 10010110.'}]});

steps.title: Checked Practice 1
steps.content: Checked practice: binary to denary

steps.title: Checked Practice 2
steps.content: Checked practice: denary to binary
steps.js: BinaryLesson.createPractice({containerId:'y9bd-practice-b',questions:[{prompt:'Convert 25 to 8-bit binary.',answer:'00011001',right:'16 + 8 + 1 = 25.'},{prompt:'Convert 73 to 8-bit binary.',answer:'01001001',right:'64 + 8 + 1 = 73.'},{prompt:'Convert 200 to 8-bit binary.',answer:'11001000',right:'128 + 64 + 8 = 200.'}]});

steps.title: Endless Practice
steps.content:
Endless practice

Answer 5 generated conversion questions correctly to complete this step.

steps.title: End of Lesson Exam
steps.content: End of lesson exam

quizQuestions.q: What is the first place value to check when converting 200 to binary?
